metadata.title: 15Loop middle-school daily expression candidates
metadata.contentBoundary: Canonical candidate forms and provenance only; no meanings, examples, questions, or copied source ordering.
metadata.frequencyCaveat: Phrasal verbs are PHaVE-crosschecked. Collocations are provisional high-frequency candidates pending licensed/open corpus validation.
